backend/main.mo: Motoko canister storing daily meal records per user with predefined categories and ingredients, offering queries for categories, ingredients, and user records.
feature_evidence.json: Placeholder feature evidence report with an empty features list.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of multiple frontend files for reference in build planning.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base with OKLCH color variables defining light/dark themes and global layout styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading icons and bootstrapping the Vite React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with three routes and wraps the app in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Provides header, navigation, footer, and page layout wrapper for all routes.
frontend/src/components/BackendConnectio: Reusable error card showing backend connection failures with retry support.
Exports predefined ingredient list and helpers for fetching by category.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor via React Query with automatic refetching on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorDiagnostics.t: Adds diagnostics helpers to check actor readiness and trigger retries.
frontend/src/hooks/useDailyForm.ts: Manages ingredient form state with update, validation, and reset utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication using AuthClient, including login state and stored identity loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Implements React Query hooks for fetching and adding daily records, including data encoding/decoding between frontend and backend formats.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom CSS variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Renders the React app root and sets up QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/DailyEntryPage.tsx: Page for entering daily inventory data, validating it, saving records, and copying vendor-friendly output.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Displays a list of saved daily records with loading/error handling and navigation to detail views.
frontend/src/pages/RecordDetailPage.tsx: Shows details of a specific saved record with options to export CSV or copy text, including error handling.
frontend/src/types/dailyForm.ts: Type definitions for ingredient form data, processed entries, and saved daily records.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Exports a SavedDailyRecord to a downloadable CSV file using browser Blob and download mechanics.
frontend/src/utils/recordPlainText.ts: Formats a SavedDailyRecord into a structured plain‑text message grouped by ingredient categories.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, content paths, extended theme colors, fonts, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Defines project state, requirements, known issues, and features for a restaurant inventory/order app with predefined ingredients and in-app data storage.
